title: How to lodge your tax return
description: Check what options you have to lodge your tax return yourself or with help from someone else.
keywords: how do I lodge a tax return, lodge tax return, my gov tax return, myTax, lodge tax registered tax agent, lodge my tax, Lodge a tax return, Tax return for individuals

content_blocks.text: Authorised by the Australian Government, Canberra.

content_text: Authorised by the Australian Government, Canberra.

child_links.title: Lodging your first tax return
child_links.description: Find out what you need to do if you are preparing and lodging a tax return for the first time.

child_links.title: Lodge your tax return online with myTax
child_links.description: Prepare and lodge your own tax return online. It is the quick, safe and secure way to lodge, most process in 2 weeks.

child_links.title: Lodge your tax return with a registered tax agent
child_links.description: Use a registered tax agent to prepare and lodge your tax return, they are the only people that can charge a fee.

child_links.title: Lodge a paper tax return
child_links.description: You can use the paper tax return to lodge your tax return by mail, most refunds issue within 50 business days.

child_links.title: Lodge your tax return before leaving Australia
child_links.description: Find out if you can lodge your tax return early (by paper) if you are leaving Australia permanently.

child_links.title: Lodge your tax return from outside Australia
child_links.description: Find out how you can lodge if you are outside Australia when your tax return is due.

child_links.title: Lodge a prior year tax return
child_links.description: Find out how to lodge if you still need to lodge a tax return for a prior year.

child_links.title: Lodge a non-lodgment advice
child_links.description: Check what you need to do if you don't need to lodge a tax return.

source_title: How to lodge your tax return | Australian Taxation Office
source_description: Check what options you have to lodge your tax return yourself or with help from someone else.
